name: oe_admin
description: Operator endpoints for QA pipelines (qa-reset, fixtures). Triple-gated by env+token+hostname.

name: oe_ai
description: AI-powered construction cost estimation from text descriptions and photos

name: oe_architecture_map
description: Interactive visual map of system architecture

name: oe_backup
description: Export and import user data backups

name: oe_bim_hub
description: BIM data management: models, elements, BOQ linking, quantity maps, and model diffs

name: oe_boq
description: Core BOQ editor with hierarchical structure, positions, and cost calculations

name: oe_cad
description: CAD file import and conversion pipeline (DWG, DGN, RVT, IFC)

name: oe_catalog
description: Curated catalog of materials, equipment, labor, and operators extracted from cost databases

name: oe_cde
description: ISO 19650 compliant Common Data Environment — document containers, revisions, state transitions, and suitability codes

name: oe_changeorders
description: Track scope changes, cost impacts, and approval workflows

name: oe_collaboration
description: Threaded comments with @mentions and viewpoints for any entity

name: oe_contacts
description: Unified contacts directory for clients, subcontractors, suppliers, consultants

name: oe_correspondence
description: Project correspondence tracking — letters, emails, notices with direction, contacts, and document cross-references

name: oe_costs
description: Cost item management, rate databases (CWICR, RSMeans, BKI), bulk import

name: oe_documents
description: Upload, categorize, and manage project documents with tagging and search

name: oe_dwg_takeoff
description: 2D DWG/DXF drawing viewer with measurements, annotations, and BOQ linking

name: oe_enterprise_workflows
description: Configurable approval workflows for invoices, purchase orders, variations, and BOQs

name: oe_erp_chat
description: AI-powered chat with tool-calling for construction ERP data

name: oe_fieldreports
description: Daily field reports for construction sites — weather, workforce, delays, safety incidents, and approvals

name: oe_finance
description: Invoicing, payments, budgets, and Earned Value Management for construction projects

name: oe_full_evm
description: Advanced Earned Value Management with forecasting, S-curves, and TCPI analysis

name: oe_i18n_foundation
description: Multi-currency exchange rates, country registry, work calendars, tax configurations

name: oe_inspections
description: Quality inspection management — concrete pours, waterproofing, MEP, fire stopping, handover with checklists and pass/fail workflows

name: oe_integrations
description: Chat connectors (Teams, Slack, Telegram), outgoing webhooks, email, iCal feeds

name: oe_markups
description: Drawing markups, scale calibration, and stamp templates for document annotation

name: oe_match_elements
description: Map BIM/CAD/PDF/photo elements to CWICR cost positions; auto-load scaled resources into BOQ

name: oe_meetings
description: Meeting minutes management — agendas, attendees, action items, and status tracking

name: oe_ncr
description: NCR management — material, workmanship, design non-conformances with root cause analysis and corrective actions

name: oe_notifications
description: In-app notification system with i18n keys and per-user preferences

name: oe_opencde_api
description: BuildingSMART OpenCDE Foundation API 1.1 + BCF API 3.0 compliance layer

name: oe_procurement
description: Purchase orders, goods receipts, and vendor management for construction projects

name: oe_project_intelligence
description: AI-powered project completion analysis, scoring, and guided recommendations

name: oe_projects
description: Project management with regional settings, classification standards, and validation configuration

name: oe_punchlist
description: Track construction deficiencies, quality issues, and snag items with photo evidence and verification workflows

name: oe_reporting
description: KPI snapshots, report templates, and generated reports for projects and portfolios

name: oe_requirements
description: Extract, validate, and track construction requirements using EAC triplets

name: oe_rfi
description: RFI management — questions, responses, cost/schedule impact tracking, and drawing cross-references

name: oe_rfq_bidding
description: Request for Quotation management with bid submission, evaluation, and award workflows

name: oe_risk
description: Track project risks, assess probability and impact, manage mitigation strategies

name: oe_safety
description: Safety incident reporting and observation tracking with risk scoring, corrective actions, and regulatory compliance

name: oe_schedule
description: 4D construction scheduling — linking BOQ positions to a timeline

name: oe_submittals
description: Construction submittal management — shop drawings, product data, samples with review/approval workflows

name: oe_takeoff
description: Manual and AI-assisted quantity takeoff from drawings and models

name: oe_teams
description: Team-based entity visibility and access control within projects

name: oe_tendering
description: Bid package management, distribution, collection, and comparison

name: oe_transmittals
description: Formal document transmittal management with recipients, acknowledgements, and responses

name: oe_uploads
description: HMAC-signed direct PUT endpoint for LocalStorageBackend presigned URLs.

name: oe_users
description: User management, JWT authentication, API keys, and RBAC
